noProductsInCategory: No products found in this category.
tamuDescription: Tamu Stores is an online marketplace that connects shoppers with a wide selection of everyday products at affordable prices.
tamuMeaningDesc: We focus on offering a wide range of useful, well-priced products and a reliable shopping experience.
shippingOriginDesc: Orders are shipped through our logistics partners. Shipping origin varies by product and seller.
empowermentDesc: Everyone deserves to live the life they dream of having
realTimeResponses: We aim to respond as quickly as possible.
canContactService: You can reach our customer service team by email for help with orders, returns, and general questions.
returnNotice: Please note, returns are handled through our return process and not at this address. To start a return, please contact customer service.
shippingOptionsDesc: You may choose standard shipping depending on the items in your order and your location. As your orders may be handed over to local carriers for the final leg of delivery, tracking may not be available every step of the way.
shippingAddressDesc: Please make sure you provide a correct and current shipping address. Certain items can only be delivered to physical addresses, and some sellers may not ship to P.O. boxes. Items cannot be delivered to security-restricted areas.
shippingTimeCostDesc1: After an order has been successfully paid and confirmed, you will see the delivery time and cost for shipping on your order confirmation page. You will also receive an order confirmation message that will outline the processing time for your order.
shippingTimeCostDesc2: It may take 1-3 days to process your order. You will receive a message once your order has been shipped.
shippingTimeCostDesc3: You'll receive a shipment notification message that will provide you with the delivery time for each package once it is shipped. You will be provided with the tracking number when it is ready. You can view this delivery time under each package in your order history at the same time.
shippingTimeCostDesc4: In most cases, your order will be delivered within the time of delivery. However, the actual delivery date may be affected by flight arrangements, weather conditions, and other external factors. Please refer to the tracking information for the most up to date delivery date.
deliveryIssuesDesc: If your package has not been delivered or your tracking information shows that your package has been delivered but you have not received it, please contact our customer service immediately and within 90 days of the order date.
